title: Crafty Particles
description: Crafty Particles enhances the look of vanilla particles, making them cleaner and more modern. A lightweight resource pack that adds visual life to the game without hurting performance.
body: Crafty Particles is an early beta resource pack designed to improve the look of Minecraft’s vanilla particles. Currently, only some particles are retextured, and we’re still experimenting to find the perfect style. Expect frequent updates as we refine the visuals and expand coverage to all particles. This pack is lightweight and aims to enhance the game’s atmosphere without affecting performance.
